dependency_lock.note: This repository pins minimum versions in requirements.txt and has no separate lock file; requirements.txt's own hash is used as the dependency-lock proxy. Recorded as a deliberate deviation from the plan's literal 'lock hash' wording, per Implementation Plan - MVP 2.md section 2.3's instruction to record tooling deviations rather than silently omit them.

known_limitations: Implementation Plan - MVP 1.md, Phase 6 exit gate: the negative_cashflow expected golden output was hand-verified (every metric/trend/finding/risk recomputed from raw transactions and cross-checked against the code) but never signed off by a literal second human reviewer - no second reviewer was available for this solo project. Disclosed here rather than silently treated as satisfied; does not block Phase 11's release gate, which the plan treats as the authoritative final gate for MVP 1 completeness.

Per-phase tags phase0-done through phase10-done were never created (each phase's own exit gate marks tagging as 'pending explicit request; not performed unilaterally'). Only phase11-done, the tag Phase MVP2-0's entry criterion actually requires, was created, on explicit user request, on this manifest's accepted_commit_sha.
